name: Job Search LinkedIn - Leadership Roles - HTTP

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const sourceId = encodeURIComponent($json.sourceId || ""); const source = ($json.source || "").replace(/"/g, ""); return `https://api.airtable.com/v0/appHQJJBGSLIXybkr/tbltkycOY9FgUdQpm?filterByFormula=AND({Source ID}="${sourceId}",{Source}="${source}")`; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "records": [
    {
      "fields": {
        "Job Title": "{{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.jobTitle }}",
        "Company": "{{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.company }}",
        "Location": "{{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.location }}",
        "Source": "{{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.source.replace(/"/g, '') }}",
        "Source ID": "{{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.sourceId }}",
        "Source URL": "{{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.sourceUrl }}",
        "Posted Date": "{{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.postedDate ? $('Dedup and Score').item.json.postedDate.split('T')[0]: null }}",
        "Salary Min": {{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.salaryMin || 'null' }},
        "Salary Max": {{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.salaryMax || 'null' }},
        "Employment Type": "{{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.employmentType }}",
        "Workplace Type": "{{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.workplaceType }}",
        "Company Size": "{{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.companySize }}",
        "Company Industry": "{{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.companyIndustry }}",
        "Description Snippet": {{ JSON.stringify($('Dedup and Score').item.json.descriptionSnippet) }},
        "Full Description": {{ JSON.stringify($('Dedup and Score').item.json.fullDescription) }},
        "Relevance Score": {{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.relevanceScore }},
        "Score Breakdown": {{ JSON.stringify($('Dedup and Score').item.json.scoreBreakdown) }},
        "AI Governance Match": {{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.aiGovernanceMatch }},
        "Status": "New",
        "Easy Apply": {{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.easyApply || false }},
        "Applicants": {{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.applicants || 'null' }},
        "First Seen": "{{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.firstSeen ? $('Dedup and Score').item.json.firstSeen.split('T')[0] : null }}",
        "Last Seen": "{{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.lastSeen ? $('Dedup and Score').item.json.lastSeen.split('T')[0] : null }}",
        "Dual Office NY+London": {{ $('Dedup and Score').item.json.dualOfficeNYLondon || false }}
      }
    }
  ]
}
